posts.text: Hand holding in Option trading (not intraday). Even Leap is also fine — Hello Together, I have been into options since 6-7 yrs… but not in profit. I am also a working professional Now Since 3 yrs, I am into mainly option selling. From then, i am able to manage to be in 0 loss, better than earlier option buying. Since I am working professional, less time for trade in a day. I know all stretegies of Options theoretically. Does any one support me in hand holding with live market… Need suggestion, how to choose strike prices? when to exit or when to adjust stretegies… In live, which strategy to be…
